text: - 6.2 EXISTING WORK: Subcontractor shall review the critical dimensions and elevations of existing work and shall endeavor to verify the conformity of existing work to the Subcontract Documents and its suitability for receiving the work of this Subcontract in the capacity of a contractor and not a design professional. Subcontractor shall promptly notify the Contractor in writing of any discrepancies or unacceptable conditions as they relate to its work. Subcontractor shall not attach to cover any work that is not properly installed. Removal and replacement costs of any installed materials specifically, but not limited to, drywall, insulation and stucco associated with deficiencies in the Subcontractor's work behind covered-up walls will be Subcontractor's responsibility.
